issues.title: Generic CTA text in header
issues.description: Header uses generic 'Get Started' and 'Sign In' CTAs without clear value proposition or destination. These should be more specific to HR services (e.g., 'Schedule Consultation', 'Request Quote').
issues.recommendation: Replace generic CTAs with HR-specific actions: 'Schedule Consultation' instead of 'Get Started', and 'Client Portal' instead of 'Sign In'. Add onClick handlers to navigate to contact form or client portal.

issues.title: Weak CTA in hero section
issues.description: Hero section has two CTAs: 'Get Started' (generic) and 'Schedule Consultation' (better but vague). The primary CTA should be more specific about what happens next (e.g., 'Get Free HR Assessment', 'Talk to an Expert').
issues.recommendation: Make primary CTA more specific and value-driven: 'Get Free HR Assessment' or 'Talk to an Expert Today'. Ensure it links to contact form with appropriate context.

issues.title: Non-functional header CTAs
issues.description: Header 'Sign In' and 'Get Started' buttons have no onClick handlers or href attributes - they do nothing when clicked. These are placeholder buttons that need implementation.
issues.recommendation: Add onClick handlers or href attributes to make buttons functional. Example: or
issues.suggestedFix: Replace lines 48-53 with:

issues.title: Non-functional footer links
issues.description: Footer contains multiple links with href='#' that go nowhere: Services links, Company links (About Us, Our Team, Careers, Resources, Contact), and legal links (Privacy Policy, Terms of Service). These are placeholder links.
issues.recommendation: Update all footer links with actual routes. Services should link to /services with anchors, Company links should route to actual pages or sections, legal links should point to policy pages.
issues.suggestedFix:
Replace href='#' with actual routes:
- Services: href='/services#compliance', href='/services#talent', etc.
- About Us: href='/about'
- Contact: href='/#contact'
- Privacy/Terms: href='/privacy', href='/terms' (create these pages)

issues.title: Client logos are placeholders
issues.description: Client logos section shows 12 companies with abbreviated names (TS, GL, CM, etc.) instead of actual logos. While this demonstrates social proof structure, real client logos or testimonials would be more credible.
issues.recommendation: Replace placeholder abbreviations with actual client logos (if permission obtained) or remove this section if real clients can't be displayed. Alternatively, use industry badges/certifications instead.

issues.title: Team photos are placeholder icons
issues.description: About page leadership team uses generic user icons instead of actual photos. Real photos would build more trust and credibility.
issues.recommendation: Add actual team member photos or professional headshots. If photos aren't available, consider using professional illustrations or removing the visual element entirely.

issues.title: Contact form could use better client-side validation
issues.description: Contact form has basic HTML5 validation (required fields) but could benefit from more robust client-side validation with better error messages and field-specific validation (email format, phone format).
issues.recommendation: Add field-specific validation with clear error messages. Example: validate email format, phone format, provide inline error feedback before submission.

issues.title: Newsletter form could use better validation
issues.description: Newsletter form has basic HTML5 validation but could provide better user feedback with inline validation and clearer error messages.
issues.recommendation: Add email format validation with inline feedback, show validation errors before submission attempt.
